persona.name: Olivia Williams
persona.motivations_goals: Read as many books as possible and eventually become a writer
persona.communication_style: Articulate, uses literary references, thinks before speaking
persona.backstory: Has kept a journal since she was eight and prefers the company of books to most people

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.
Connecting main classroom hallway and the north yard
Yard on the far right of the building, with an exit point.
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Outdoor garden area with plants and benches

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Outside courtyard to the outside of the building, with an exit point.
Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.

actions.plan: I should head to the library to find a new book to read. The hallway leads there, and I can enjoy some quiet time.
James and Mateo are here, but I’d rather avoid conversation and focus on getting to the library. I’ll continue walking quietly.
I heard a gunshot—there’s an active shooter. I need to stay calm and follow the crowd to safety. I’ll head to the garden since others might be going there.
The shooter is nearby, and I’m in the garden. I see others heading towards the outside_courtyard—I’ll follow them to escape.

memories.description: Decided to go to the library to find a new book. Left classroom3 and started walking towards hallway2.
Saw James and Mateo in hallway2 but chose to continue walking towards hallway4 to avoid conversation and reach the library.
Heard a gunshot and realized there’s an active shooter. Decided to follow the crowd and sprint towards the garden for safety.
Saw others heading towards the outside_courtyard and decided to follow them to escape the shooter.
